# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: MyWebApp
    location: eastus
    properties:
      appSettings:
        - name: ConnectionStrings__MyDatabase
          value: Server=MySQLDatabase.database.windows.net;Database=MyDatabase;User Id=myuser;Password=mypassword;Encrypt=True;
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: WEBSITE_HOSTNAME_DNS_LABEL
            value: myapp.azurewebsites.net

  - type: Microsoft.SQLDatabase/servers
    name: MySQLDatabase
    location: eastus
    properties:
      administratorLogin: myuser
      administratorPassword: mypassword

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: MyStorageAccount
    location: eastus
    properties:
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accessTier: Hot

  - type: Microsoft.Network/trafficManagerProfiles
    name: MyTrafficManagerProfile
    location: global
    properties:
      trafficRoutingMethod: Performance
      endpoints:
        - name: MyWebApp
          targetResourceId: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/MyWebApp
